productDisplayName: Reebok Men's Hexride Crussion White Shoe
description: WHERE STYLE MEETS PERFORMANCEThe latest edition of the reebok HexRide, the HexRide Crussion stands apart for its unique honeycomb-style build with a classic strength to weight ratio that shoe engineering can ever offer. A perfect shoe for the neutral runner, the reebok HexRide Crussion is constructed using lateral heel HexRide technology for those who aspire for lightweight cushioning when on the move.Inspired by the busy beeThe Reebok HexRide Crussion stands apart from the rest of the running shoes in the market for its unique hexagonal outsole. Designed in a honeycomb pattern, this rubber outsole has capsules that fill up with air and offer premier cushioning which helps the runner propel forward with utmost comfort, stability and comfort. Pressure testedBuilding upon its Hexalite technology, the Reebok HexRide Crussion gives you that Hex experience through the entire length of its durable rubber outsole. Each Hexalite cushion is filled with air and every pod has been tested to withstand 115 newtons of pressure from a roofing nail, and none of them ever popped. An absolute test of durability indeed!Seamless comfortTo add to this absolute in shock absorption and propulsion from the outsole is the SmoothFit technology employed in the upper and inner of this shoe. The seamless Fit offered by the Reebok HexRide Crussion keeps your feet safe from abrasion and blistering, offering your a ride at its best. However, ensure you are neither an overpronator or a supinator to ensure you have the best of technically correct comfort runs.The insole accommodates a removable sockliner that allows you to replace it with an orthotic for that added comfort. Replete with a synthetic mesh upper for enhanced breathability and dry, fresh comfort, the Reebok HexRide Crussion is a true winner.Upper Mesh uppers with synthetic overlays for lightweight breathability Padded collar and tongue for superior fit and comfort Lace-ups for a snug fit Midsole EVA midsole for cushioning and better shock absorption Outsole HEXRIDE footwear features a unique hexagonal, honeycomb-style build where the hexagons impart stability while the air-filled capsules offer cushioning Hexagonal pattern also provides traction   Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
